pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.15 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime failures or incompatibility with modern libraries on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build tool (Maven) needs to target Java 21 to compile and run the application on the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit dependency on javax.annotation-api.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is part of the Java EE namespace which was removed in Java 11 and replaced by Jakarta EE; Spring Boot 3 manages the replacement (jakarta.annotation-api) or it is no longer needed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new Jakarta-compatible artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not support Java 21 or Jakarta EE namespaces correctly; the new artifact 'mysql-connector-j' is the supported version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from flyway-core to let Spring Boot manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages the compatible version of Flyway; specifying an old version (4.2.0) would cause incompatibility with Spring Boot 3's expectations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the flyway-mysql dependency to provide the MySQL database support for Flyway.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 9+ split database support into separate modules; without this dependency, Flyway will fail at runtime when trying to connect to MySQL.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from byte-buddy to let Spring Boot manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages a compatible version of ByteBuddy; specifying an older version may cause classloading or compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from byte-buddy-agent to let Spring Boot manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages a compatible version of ByteBuddy Agent; specifying an older version may cause compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from groovy to let Spring Boot manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages a compatible version of Groovy; specifying an older version may cause compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.mail-api with jakarta.mail-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.mail-api is not available in the Jakarta EE namespace used by Spring Boot 3; code using javax.mail will fail to compile or run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude junit from testng dependency to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5 managed by Spring Boot.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses JUnit 5; including JUnit 4 via TestNG can cause classpath conflicts or test runner issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from amqp-client to let Spring Boot manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages a compatible version of the RabbitMQ client; specifying an older version may cause compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from jedis to let Spring Boot manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages a compatible version of Jedis; specifying an older version may cause compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from h2 to let Spring Boot manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages a compatible version of H2; specifying an older version may cause compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin version to 0.8.15-SNAPSHOT.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo may not fully support Java 21 bytecode or features.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/domain/c.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings in newer JDKs.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/domain/e.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices enforced in Java 21.
Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation on serialVersionUID.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/domain/s.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) calls with the Java 21 List.getFirst() method for cleaner syntax.
Add import for Spring Boot 3.3 annotation to support database initialization dependency management.
Annotate sessionFactory bean to ensure it initializes after database schema scripts have run.
Annotate flyway bean to ensure it initializes after database schema scripts have run.
Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing compilation errors due to missing packages.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE standards.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3.x applications; using it causes a compilation error (cannot find symbol) or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(int) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ module system restrictions on serializable fields.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a class implementing Serializable must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ when the class is in a named module or when strict serializable field checks are enabled.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3.x applications; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt Java 21 API.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: List.get(0) is not removed in Java 21, but the migration intent is to use the new default method List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21 for better readability and safety (throws NoSuchElementException if empty instead of IndexOutOfBoundsException). This is a polishment as the old code still compiles and runs.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.before: dao.read(Log.class, "select log from Log as log where log.id = :logid",param).get(0)
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.after: dao.read(Log.class, "select log from Log as log where log.id = :logid",param).getFirst()
